sections.title: If the player is not wearing a catspeak amulet or has completed the enchantment portion of Dragon Slayer II yet

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey kitty!

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Hiss!

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Hello, no-fur. What are you doing in my mistress's garden?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looking for sq'irks.

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: If it's sq'irks you're after then you've come to the right place. We've got four seasons' worth of them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've a couple of questions.

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: I'd be happy to help a friend of the feline.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: The Sphinx gave you that amulet, so she must hold you in high regard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I remember correctly, it was the High Priest of Sophanem who gave it to me.

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: He and the Sphinx are as thick as thieves, but regardless, I think you've a bit of a cat feel about you.

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Now what are these questions?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the creatures inside the gardens?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Oh, you mean the gardeners?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The strange, floaty creatures.

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Yes, the gardeners. Don't let them see you or they'll teleport you out here. They're very protective of their crops.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I have another question though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you get into the seasonal gardens?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: I get in through gaps in the hedge. You are a little too big to squeeze through. I think you'll have to use the gates.

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: I think the gates are locked, so you'll have to have good Thieving skills to get in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I have another question though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How is it that the gardens are in different seasons?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: How did you get here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Magic?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Exactly. The Sorceress likes to have a good supply of in-season sq'irks and herbs at all times.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I have another question though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get out of here?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Take a drink from the fountain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I have another question though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Talking to cats.

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: A noble and rewarding past-time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you get here?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Every time I play with spiders in the Sorceress's house, her silly apprentice completely freaks out and teleports me here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you've been stuck here since?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: No, silly! I drink from the fountain whenever I want to leave.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I have another question though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: I get this strange urge for sq'irks. It's quite peculiar. I think I may be addicted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I know someone else who may be in a similar position.

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Don't tell me. Osman, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know him too?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Oh, he used to come here all the time. Then one day, he just stopped.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I have another question though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Del-Monty the cat, at your service.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you a famous adventurer who was turned into a cat by a vindictive mage?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: No; as I said, I'm Del-Monty the cat, connoisseur of exotic fruits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In that case, can you tell me anything about sq'irks?

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: But of course! Their juice is an excellent source of energy for runners, and in the riper varieties they are known to heighten one's Thieving abilities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I have another question though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing much.

lines.speaker: Del-Monty
lines.text: Yawn! Nice talking to you then, no-fur.
